title: WireSkillLog
description:
`GET /v1/workspaces/{ws}/skills/{skill}/log` response — the skill's version history (purge
tombstones included) and its proposal events. An ARCHIVED skill stays addressable here; asking by a
freed base name answers the archived successor as a hint. Member-scoped.

base_name.description: The pre-archive name, when archived (what the skill was called before the rename freed it).

name.description: The skill's current catalog name (the archived spelling once archived).

versions.description:
The versions, newest first where orderable (the ancestry walk stops at reclaimed history;
tombstoned leftovers follow unordered).

WireLogProposal.description: One proposal event in a skill's history (open, and every resolution).

created_at.description: When the proposal was opened (server-stamped string).

resolved_at.description: When it was resolved (server-stamped string), when resolved.

resolved_reason.description: The resolution reason (a reject's rationale; a closure's cause), when recorded.

version_id.description: The proposed version's commit id (64-char lowercase hex).

WireLogVersion.description:
One version in a skill's history. A PURGED version stays listed — who purged it and when — with its
bytes gone (author/message may be absent once the underlying objects are reclaimed).

author.description: The version author, when the commit object is still readable.

current.description: Whether this version is the skill's `current`.

message.description: The version message, when the commit object is still readable.

purged_at.description: When the version's bytes were purged (epoch milliseconds) — the tombstone half.

purged_by.description: Who purged the version's bytes — the tombstone half.

version_id.description: The version's commit id (64-char lowercase hex).
